creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks.
What do you think the "note to packagers"? https://github.com/pgbackrest/pgbackrest/releases/tag/release%2F2.51
"NOTE TO PACKAGERS: The build system for pgBackRest is now meson. The autoconf/make build will not receive any new features and will be removed after a few releases."

Do you change to meson at the next version?
